name: Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients until it looks right.
- Heat about 4 inches of oil in a skillet at 450°F.
- Add hot oil to the mixture if necessary.
- Roll the batter around in the skillet to grease well and mix gently.
2. Pour into the greased skillet and bake until golden brown.
- Enjoy your Alabama cornbread!
